_readme: allowedProfileSlugs = keys in profile-template-mapping.js. First matching urlProfileRules wins. showRightSidebar is per rule. If the URL matches no matchSubstring (or accessUrl is missing), APIs return 404. Commit this file for Vercel — untracked copies never reach production. matchSubstring is checked case-insensitively. Path-style links like https://host/YOUR_TOKEN use middleware so YOUR_TOKEN is not mistaken for a profile slug.
